title: Open Accessible Version From Inaccessible AU Page
goal: From the inaccessible AU home page, open the more accessible version and stop there.
instruction: On the inaccessible AU home page, choose the correct "click here" link that opens the more accessible version and stop when that page loads.
review_notes: Medium-difficulty accessibility-first task from the dataset matrix. Tests disambiguation among repeated uninformative link text on the inaccessible page.

success_assertions.value: Accessible University Demo Site - Accessible Version

steps.explanation: I chose the "click here" link that opens the more accessible version of this page.

action.summary: I reached the accessible AU home page and stopped there.

steps.explanation: The accessible version is open now, so I am ending the task.
